headline: Stable negative sentiment (score: -14.9)
key_insights: Optimism trending up 120% over 7 days (strong momentum)
sentiment_commentary:
• Frustrations dominate with 144 quotes and 101 at strong intensity, meaning a large volume of people are venting hard today.
• The score of 36.2 sits in the lower-middle of the 153-day range (−1.9 to 165.7), so while elevated, this is far from peak frustration levels.
• Frustrations pulled back sharply from yesterday's 77.8, while Optimism flipped positive and Fears dipped further negative, suggesting the mood is cooling slightly but remains unsettled.
methodology: See METHODOLOGY.md. Scores use z-score normalization with empirically-derived intensity weights from analytics_config.yaml. Alerts at |z| >= threshold (configurable, default 2.0 for p < 0.05).
